---
title: "Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation"
description: "Book overview and study-note index for Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation."
book_id: "handbook-practical-program-evaluation"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Book"
citation_key: "newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-1:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch01-chapter-1-planning-and-designing-useful-evaluations:c0003"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch05-chapter-5-performance-measurement:c0001"
source_status: "needs_review"
---
<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.landing-hero}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Book notes</span>

# Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation

Study notes on *Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation* [@newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation]. These notes are generated from source-linked MCP research-library records and are intended for study, comparison, and later refinement.

<div class="page-metadata">
  <span>3 major-section notes</span>
  <span>2015</span>
  <span>Source status: needs_review</span>
  <span>MCP evaluation-texts</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.section-grid}
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-synthesis">Synthesis</span>

### [Core Concepts](concepts.qmd)

Recurring ideas and distinctions used across these notes.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-map">Map</span>

### [Chapter Map](chapter-map.qmd)

Selected source sections, page ranges, and reading routes.
:::

::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-practice">Practice</span>

### [Practice Implications](practice-implications.qmd)

Practical evaluation design habits drawn from the notes.
:::
:::

</div>

## Source

<div class="chapter-meta"><span>2015</span><span>MCP evaluation-texts</span><span>Status: needs_review</span><span>Book overview</span></div>

This index summarises generated study notes for Kathryn E. Newcomer, Harry P. Hatry, and Joseph S. Wholey's *Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation* [@newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation]. The generated pages use selected MCP research-library retrieval records and compact evidence summaries.

## Core Argument

Practical evaluation should be credible enough for decisions and useful enough to improve public and nonprofit programs.

## Major-Section Notes

- [Evaluation Planning and Design](section-01-planning-and-design.qmd) - source pages 43-45
- [Planning and Designing Useful Evaluations](section-02-planning-useful-evaluations.qmd) - source pages 49-51
- [Performance Measurement and Program Evaluation](section-03-performance-measurement.qmd) - source pages 150-151

## References
